Trained on 4 clinical datasets

Model performance

We merged 861 patient records from Cleveland Clinic, Hungarian Institute, VA Long Beach, and Switzerland (UCI Heart Disease databases), then trained an ensemble AI.

    Guided assessment

    Talk to your AI heart-risk assistant

    The bot collects 13 health measurements in plain language, then runs them through our ensemble model (Random Forest + gradient boosting).

    • 13health signals
    • 90%+validated accuracy
    • Liveinference

    Plain language

    Medical terms explained

    Not sure what a word means? Use this guide while you chat with the assistant.

    1 · Four datasets

    More diverse training data than a single hospital study alone.

    2 · Ensemble AI

    Two algorithms vote together for a more stable risk estimate.

    3 · You stay informed

    Glossary + chat guidance so jargon does not get in the way.

    Important safety notice

    CardioRisk AI is for learning and research demos only. It does not diagnose disease and cannot replace emergency care or your doctor. If you have chest pain or an emergency, call emergency services.

    © CardioRisk AI · Educational use only
